title: Execute paginated queries
description: Given a large result set, when I execute() with limit and next_token directives, it should return paginated results with cursor-based pagination matching the DynamoDB pattern. Supports descending sort direction: pagination with sort_direction desc traverses in correct reverse order. Full traversal yields all records with no duplicates. Spec: features/query/execute_pagination.feature
